reviews.comment:
El playero que me atendio a la.manana en plena tormenta frio y viento lo mas
Super amable  me cambio las escobillas que estaban rotas y todo eran cerca de las 8 am
Me dijo qje a las 9 am abria el local de ventas y los boxes llegue a las 10 me cambiaron lo que necesitaba solo que tuve mucha demora

(Translated by Google)
The attendant who helped me in the morning, in the middle of the cold and windy storm, was incredibly kind. He replaced my broken wiper blades and everything else; it was around 8 am. He told me the sales area and service bays would open at 9 am. I arrived at 10 am, and they replaced what I needed, but I had a long wait.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHbUwzVzFRRRAB
